author: m.kalinin
content:
<@602753420033785856> this is interesting https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/issues/5286
Could you please give more detail behind the corresponding change for `update_proposer_boost_root` in Gloas? I.e. the one that doesn't give boost for a block from a non-canonical proposer? This may only happen when dependent root of the head and a new block are different, right?

author: sproul
content: I don’t know exactly why that condition was added, it’s mostly a PITA as far as I can tell 🤣

author: sproul
content: but yeah I agree for it to be relevant the canonical chain needs to have a different decision root to the block being imported

author: sproul
content: (actually that is sufficient but not necessary, the proposer could coincidentally be the same)

author: m.kalinin
content: an edge case within an edge case...

author: m.kalinin
content: I would remove this check, cc <@520034910149410861>

author: sproul
content: do you mean completely? I was being a bit facetious. I can see the value in not giving proposer boost on some random sidechain (which could allow it to supplant the head). But AFAICT we don't need to run `get_head` midway through `on_block`, that's kind of bonkers, and we could probably tighten the check to a decision root check to rule out the coincidental proposer problem.

author: m.kalinin
content: Malicious actor can "steal" boost given to an honest proposer by proposing on an ephemeral chain. What could be the worst outcome form this?

author: jih2nn
content: Here is the [link](https://www.youtube.com/live/46mcVxJaCiw?si=MluivFLFoGr95e5c&t=796) to the intro of the change, if it helps

author: m.kalinin
content: thank you so much! This is very helpful!

author: m.kalinin
content: Francesco is mentioning a coordination for this fix to be rolled out. Does this fix heavily rely on coordination? Has it been rolled out on mainnet already?

author: jtraglia
content: IIRC this doesn't not require coordination.

author: m.kalinin
content: Thanks Jihoon! I would like to backport this and some other changes to Phase0, I know there might be some issues with that related to passing spect tests as has been mentioned by <@755590043632140352> in that thread. But I think that having `update_proposer_boost_root` since Phase0 makes more sense than introducing it in Gloas only

author: jih2nn
content: Do you want to discuss this in ACDC this week?

author: m.kalinin
content: Unfortunately, I won't be able to attend it this week

author: potuz
content: This is because otherwise any random validator can remove PB from an honest one

author: potuz
content: I wouldn't, and I agree with Francesco that having any random proposer remove honest boost is silly

author: m.kalinin
content: Then we need to fix the spec to compute an expected `proposer_index` before applying a block to the Store

author: potuz
content: Ah crap I should have continued reading

author: potuz
content: We do this in Prysm

author: potuz
content: Well, not exactly
